ingredients_text:
Aquafaba: 80g (prepared by reducing 160g by half through heating)
Glucose syrup: 87g
Caster sugar: 433g
Water: 167g
Dried goji berry: 50g
Dried cranberry: 15g
Walnuts: 50g
Almond slices: 30g
Toasted sesame seeds: 5g
Vanilla extract: 10g
Sea salt: 10g
Xanthan gum: 1g
Cream of tartar: 1g
Lemon juice: 1g
Agar agar: 4g
Pea protein: 3g
